title: Tales of the Third Age - Balrog
description: Adds a Balrog Boss to your Middle Earth modding experience!
body: Challenge yourself and your journey within Middle Earth by taking on Durin's Bane! This mod adds a fully functional boss with fight mechanics and configurable difficulty settings. This mod is in beta currently and the boss can be spawned via spawn egg or commands/command blocks but does not currently spawn naturally in survival. Drop tables also are empty aside from experience. This mod is designed for server usage on the Tales of the Third Age - Middle Earth Mod Server. Thanks and Enjoy!
